description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image zngguvnf/emacs:firsttry. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs the following shell commands: emacs --batch --eval "(progn (package-initialize) (package-refresh-contents)(package-install 'org))", emacs --batch --no-init-file --load publish.el --funcall org-static-blog-publish, cp -r *.html public, cp -r posts/*.html public, cp -r rss.xml public. The job should publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and only run on the master branch.
